---
title: "analyzer.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/analyzer.ts"
loc: 210
complexity: 30
logic_score: 1.00
style_score: 3.91
intel_score: 6.00
overall_score: 3.64
---

## Intent
Calculates structural logic density using CC and nesting metrics.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://./parser.js)
- [*](file://node:crypto)
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://./calculus/logic.js)
- [*](file://./calculus/style.js)
- [*](file://./calculus/intel.js)
- [*](file://./intel/gravity_db.js)
- [*](file://./pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `analyzeFile`
- `detectEndpoints`
- `getSystemAnomaly`
- `analyzeMarkdown`
- `calculateLOC`
